tasks.label: discovery-crawl
args: /c
cd fis_scraper && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m scrapy crawl fis_discovery -a max_urls=1200 -a output_file=input/urls_master.txt

tasks.label: discovery-quick
args: /c
cd fis_scraper && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m scrapy crawl fis_discovery -a max_urls=350 -a output_file=input/urls_master.txt

tasks.label: discovery-seed-120
args: /c
cd fis_scraper && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m scrapy crawl fis_discovery -a max_urls=120 -a output_file=input/urls_master.txt

tasks.label: pilot-batch-01-scope5
args: /c
cd fis_scraper && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m scrapy crawl fis_pilot -a seed_file=input/urls_master.txt -a scope_limit=5 -a review_from=0 -a max_interactions=5
